page_metadata.biotools__summary: EQscore is a computer‐assisted image‐processing algorithm to reliably quantify erythema (across a range of skin types) in the dermatology clinical setting.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: EQscore is a computer‐assisted image‐processing algorithm to reliably quantify erythema (across a range of skin types) in the dermatology clinical setting.
